mapper.sql: A.CPYRHT_ID AS cpyrhtId , A.CPYRHT_PRTC_POLICY_CN AS cpyrhtPrtcPolicyCn , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm , A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID AS lastUpdusrId , TO_CHAR(A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS lastUpdusrPnttm
mapper.select: SELECT FROM TB_CPYRHT_INFO A WHERE 1=1 AND A.CPYRHT_PRTC_POLICY_CN LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}),'%') ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CPYRHT_INFO A WHERE 1=1 AND A.CPYRHT_PRTC_POLICY_CN LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}),'%')
